ddls:
CREATE TABLE "credentials" (
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credential type */,
  "credential_name" TEXT /* Name of the credential (e.g., Certificate, Associate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the credential type */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the credential program in years */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the credential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credential_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields_of_study_2digit" (
  "field_id_2digit" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each 2-digit CIP code */,
  "field_name_2digit" TEXT /* 2-digit CIP code (e.g., 01, 02) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the 2-digit CIP code */,
  "parent_field_id_2digit" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent 2-digit CIP code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id_2digit")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields_of_study_4digit" (
  "field_id_4digit" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each 4-digit CIP code */,
  "field_id_2digit" INTEGER /* Reference to the 2-digit CIP code */,
  "field_name_4digit" TEXT /* 4-digit CIP code (e.g., 01.00, 01.01) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the 4-digit CIP code */,
  "parent_field_id_4digit" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent 4-digit CIP code */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the field of study is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id_4digit"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fields_of_study_4digit_parent_field_id_4digit FOREIGN KEY ("parent_field_id_4digit") REFERENCES fields_of_study_4digit ("field_id_4digit"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fields_of_study_4digit_field_id_2digit FOREIGN KEY ("field_id_2digit") REFERENCES fields_of_study_2digit ("field_id_2digit")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduates" (
  "graduate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduate */,
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the credential type */,
  "field_id_4digit" INTEGER /* Reference to the 4-digit CIP code */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year of graduation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the graduate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the graduate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the graduate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the graduate */,
  "age_at_graduation" INTEGER /* Age of the graduate at the time of graduation */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the graduate */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the graduate */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence of the graduate */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence of the graduate */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the graduate */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the graduate */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the graduate is an international student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduates_field_id_4digit FOREIGN KEY ("field_id_4digit") REFERENCES fields_of_study_4digit ("field_id_4digit"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduates_credential_id FOREIGN KEY ("credential_id") REFERENCES credentials ("credential_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment outcome */,
  "graduate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the graduate */,
  "years_after_graduation" INTEGER /* Number of years after graduation */,
  "median_income" TEXT /* Median income of the graduate */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., employed, unemployed) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the graduate */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Employer of the graduate */,
  "job_location_city" TEXT /* City where the graduate is employed */,
  "job_location_state" TEXT /* State where the graduate is employed */,
  "job_location_country" TEXT /* Country where the graduate is employed */,
  "is_full_time" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the employment is full-time */,
  "is_part_time" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the employment is part-time */,
  "is_self_employed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the graduate is self-employed */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "job_industry" TEXT /* Industry of the employment */,
  "job_satisfaction" INTEGER /* Job satisfaction rating (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_outcomes_graduate_id FOREIGN KEY ("graduate_id") REFERENCES graduates ("graduate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cohort_data" (
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cohort */,
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the credential type */,
  "field_id_4digit" INTEGER /* Reference to the 4-digit CIP code */,
  "years_after_graduation" INTEGER /* Number of years after graduation */,
  "cohort_size" INTEGER /* Size of the cohort */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of gender in the cohort */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of age in the cohort */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ethnicity in the cohort */,
  "international_students_count" INTEGER /* Number of international students in the cohort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cohort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cohort_data_field_id_4digit FOREIGN KEY ("field_id_4digit") REFERENCES fields_of_study_4digit ("field_id_4digit"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cohort_data_credential_id FOREIGN KEY ("credential_id") REFERENCES credentials ("credential_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_data" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the credential type */,
  "field_id_4digit" INTEGER /* Reference to the 4-digit CIP code */,
  "years_after_graduation" INTEGER /* Number of years after graduation */,
  "median_income" TEXT /* Median income of the cohort */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of income in the cohort */,
  "income_growth_rate" TEXT /* Annual growth rate of median income */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_data_field_id_4digit FOREIGN KEY ("field_id_4digit") REFERENCES fields_of_study_4digit ("field_id_4digit"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_data_credential_id FOREIGN KEY ("credential_id") REFERENCES credentials ("credential_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program review */,
  "graduate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the graduate */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the program (1-5) */,
  "recommendation" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the graduate would recommend the program */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for program improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_reviews_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_reviews_graduate_id FOREIGN KEY ("graduate_id") REFERENCES graduates ("graduate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the credential type */,
  "field_id_4digit" INTEGER /* Reference to the 4-digit CIP code */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "tuition_fee" TEXT /* Tuition fee for the program */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Admission requirements for the program */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_credential_id FOREIGN KEY ("credential_id") REFERENCES credentials ("credential_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_field_id_4digit FOREIGN KEY ("field_id_4digit") REFERENCES fields_of_study_4digit ("field_id_4digit")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "graduate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the graduate */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "enrollment_type" TEXT /* Type of enrollment (e.g., regular, part-time) */,
  "tuition_fee_paid" TEXT /* Tuition fee paid by the graduate */,
  "financial_aid_received" TEXT /* Financial aid received by the graduate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_enrollments_graduate_id FOREIGN KEY ("graduate_id") REFERENCES graduates ("graduate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program requirement */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "requirement_name" TEXT /* Name of the requirement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours required for the requirement */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_requirements_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Course code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "instructor_email" TEXT /* Email of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "course_enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course enrollment */,
  "graduate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the graduate */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of course enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "attendance_percentage" TEXT /* Attendance percentage in the course */,
  "final_exam_score" TEXT /* Final exam score in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES program_courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_graduate_id FOREIGN KEY ("graduate_id") REFERENCES graduates ("graduate_id")
)
